title: crepidiastrum sonchifolium subsp. pubescens
intro: Crepidiastrum sonchifolium subsp. pubescens, also known as the hairy smooth sowthistle, is a subspecies of the Crepidiastrum sonchifolium plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been shown to have potential health benefits. The leaves and roots of the hairy smooth sowthistle plant have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, and have been reported to have anti-arthritic and anti-bacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Crepidiastrum sonchifolium subsp. pubescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and roots.
